feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Down The Barrel Of A Gun, For You I'll Pull The Trigger Again
entry.summary:
Author: marry_rites

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,121Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Eddie’s heart stuttered in his chest as he heard Chris call for Buck and the silence that followed his gut-wrenching cry made Eddie want to kill every single man standing around them—starting with the man standing above him like his personal hell curated around his worst fears. “Do you feel helpless?” Charlie asked as his eyebrows scrunched and his voice dropped in sympathy that was so painfully false it made Eddie’s gut turn. He could taste bile in his mouth as Charlie’s hand rose to his mouth as he covered a gasp of pain. “Oh, Eddie.”...“Eddie, listen—” Athena started but stopped when he ignored her. Eddie grabbed Charlie by the collar and started dragging him back to the shed where they’d hurt Buck—where they were planning to hurt him more just because Eddie loved him. That was all. Eddie threw Charlie to the ground and he screeched holding his leg. He crouched in front of the man. “I had four bullets with your name on them.” OR How far can they go to protect each other? Buck and Chris are taken right in front of Eddie's eyes, so it is only natural he hunts down the kidnappers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: my best guess at the future
entry.summary:
Author: lauriesamy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,449Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Before Eddie can even figure out the words to ask, Buck speaks again, always somehow managing to read his mind. “I know you want to ask about it,” he says while picking at the skin around his nails. “You—you wanna know what happened, that’s fair, but…” he sighs. “Not yet. Please.” Eddie nods, releasing a low, “Of course.” He straightens up in his seat to check the time on the radio. “We have eight hours and forty-seven minutes anyway.” Buck lets out a small huff of breath at that, but he doesn’t speak again. He turns back to the window. A new soft song plays through the speakers. Eddie wants to turn it off, but he leaves it on. He grips the wheel tighter.OR: Buck and Eddie embark on the ten-hour trip back home to Los Angeles, and a few truths slip through the cracks

entry.title: dust to dust
entry.summary:
Author: charmingqueenie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,425Chapters: 11/13Kudos: 64

Summary: Eddie leans back, gesturing for Bobby to get started. Bobby sighs, pulling off his glasses. "So how did you… become this?" Eddie cocks his head. "You can say the word." "I- uh." Bobby clears his throat. "How did you become a vampire?" or IWTV Buddie AU

entry.title: The Minute That Wouldn’t End
entry.summary:
Author: lako

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,406Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 3

Summary: A quiet drive home after something terrible, with pain, fear, and love all tangled together. Two people survive, but neither of them comes back unchanged. It feels like relief wrapped in exhaustion, and the kind of sadness that lingers even after the danger is over.

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,437Chapters: 9/13Kudos: 440

Summary: Post-lawsuit, Buck fights to reclaim his place at the 118. But the team he came back for doesn’t quite feel like home anymore, and the distance between him and Eddie keeps widening. Buck feels himself slowly disappearing - first from the team, then from himself. He's always been good at saving other people. He's never been good at saving himself. Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.title: A Night in Harlem
entry.summary:
Author: call911dumbass (heehooninc)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,505Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Harlem Renaissance, 1920s – Buck is a visiting firefighter from another city, attending a gala in Harlem that becomes the site of a mysterious fire. Eddie is a local fire inspector and poet, and their chemistry grows as they solve the mystery while exploring the vibrant culture, jazz clubs, and political tensions of the era.

entry.title: Esperame En El Cielo
entry.summary:
Author: fallenandinlovewithhumanity

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,108Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 10

Summary: Isabel Diaz knows her husband will respond when she talks to him, he's done so every time she plays a song they used to dance to or just talks out loud in a room. Today would be no different, except Isabel knows it's time, her husband has waited for her long enough. Or: Eddie gets another phone call and this time he lets himself cry, he lets himself feel.

entry.title: The Quiet Between Them
entry.summary:
Author: WhereFirefliesLand

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 109,011Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 716

Summary: Buck's used to being loud and taking up space. But lately, it feels like everyone else is talking without him. Tommy's too busy with his newfound popularity. Eddie's laughing more and spending more time with Tommy. And Buck's still trying to catch up to a conversation that keeps moving without him. There's something growing in the quiet between them. He just doesn't know what it means yet.

entry.title: this mess was yours, now your mess is mine
entry.summary:
Author: folklorestars

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,096Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: “Buck, hey, what’s wro—” Eddie stopped in his tracks. Buck was just standing there, fully clothed and on two feet. Just a slight grimace on his face as he rolled his shoulder out. “I’m okay,” he said through clenched teeth. He rolled his shoulder again, letting out a loud cry as something didn’t sit right. Eddie surged forward, hands touching Buck’s biceps to stop him from moving. “No, you’re not! What happened?” A guilty look crossed Buck’s face. Eddie raised a brow as their eyes met, waiting for an answer. Buck looked down, then back up to Eddie’s face. “I kinda forgot how difficult it might be to actually take my clothes off and shower without help from a nurse in a hospital.” Or; After a traumatising kidnapping, Buck and Eddie take care of each other in the most intimate of ways.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: visions in grey
entry.summary:
Author: effervescentwolf

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,315Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 145

Summary: Buck’s expression crumples. “They thought we were a couple,” he says. It’s not what Eddie was expecting, and he feels wrong-footed and on the defensive all over again. It had rubbed him wrong for a lot of reasons in the diner, in front of the sheriff, but he could take it from them. He can take it from someone, anyone else, and simmer over it later, but he can let it go, put it out of his mind. But he discovers now he can’t, he can’t, take it from Buck.Eddie isn’t sure what about it is worse. The fact that Buck wouldn’t have blinked an eye at this before, the nebulous before something went wrong, or that—If he was brave, he would say, Is it really that awful to you? Am I really that awful?“Yeah,” he says instead, voice as steady as he can get it, ignoring the deep, terrible feeling in his stomach, “so?”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

  • Brief Chris Appearance

entry.title: death of a bachelor
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,850Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 665

Summary: “Do none of you care about the children? It’s a bachelor auction, and you, my friend, are a bachelor. Abracadabra, put your name on the list.” “I can’t,” Eddie repeats. He can’t. He cannot. “I’m not.” “You’re not? Since when?” Chimney frowns. “Who?” It’s not Eddie’s fault that, at that exact moment, Buck walks in. So it’s not his fault that he opens his mouth and says, “Buck.”   Or, Eddie trips and falls into a lightly fraudulent HR-disclosed "consensual romantic relationship" with his best friend. Really, if you think about it, it's a win-win.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: It’s Usually the Spouse
entry.summary:
Author: comfortcrowd1122

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,446Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 211

Summary: Chimney set his wine glass down with a soft clink, shaking his head with an amused chuckle. “I still can’t believe those cops thought you murdered Buck, Diaz.” Eddie snorted, barely glancing up from his plate. “Well, I guess it made sense.” He shrugged, taking another bite. “It’s usually the spouse.” The table went silent. or At dinner with Maddie and Chim, it comes up that the whole town thought they were a couple... and that Eddie didn't deny it.

entry.title: The long way home
entry.summary:
Author: M00NR1NG

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,920Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 112

Summary: After the Firefighter Games in Nashville, a canceled flight leaves Evan Buckley and Eddie Diaz with only one option if they want to make it back to Los Angeles in time for Henrietta Wilson’s birthday: a cross-country road trip. But somewhere along the empty highways between Tennessee and California, another driver begins following them. What starts as a simple drive home ends in a crash on a lonely road—and when Eddie wakes up in the hospital, Buck is gone. Taken by a man who believes he’s on a mission from God.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Maddie Buckley/Howie "Chimney" Han
  • Henrietta "Hen" Wilson/Karen Wilson

entry.title: I have what illnesses?
entry.summary:
Author: dramione1997

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,359Chapters: 22/25Kudos: 96

Summary: Buck thought talking to Dr. Copeland would help him during the pandemic never did he think he'd get diagnosed with actual illnesses. How does he cope with the aftermath?

entry.title: Starting Anew (Will you be there too?)
entry.summary:
Author: Begen

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,121Chapters: 12/29Kudos: 249

Summary: Ever since losing his team and leaving the Seals, Buck has been alone, haunted by his past. His arrival at the 118 provides him a chance to move forward, but his past is never too far behind.
